utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: (1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs and a total monthly health cost—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with costs; also includes technology protection and total property cost—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with costs and total travel cost—fully specified. (4) additional_services: lists enhancement services, but costs are not provided (only marked as ‘Included’)—the format requires ‘with costs’; this is not fully specified. (5) total_budget: provides complete monthly/annual cost breakdown and category breakdown—fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each product named in the final coverage plan and find the exact matching item in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (home contents), Technology Protection (property enhancement service), and LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel). Map each to its corresponding rating number from the ground truth.
